title: lobelia angulata
intro: Lobelia angulata, also known as Chinese lobelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Lobelia angulata include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Lobelia angulata is typically prepared into herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
